title: [DO NOT MERGE] vendor c/image for concurrent layers pull
body:
Vendor of https://github.com/containers/image/pull/283

**PLEASE USE LATEST VNDR TOOL**
vndr got some cool updates so update it with `go get -u github.com/LK4D4/vndr`

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca <runcom@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM assuming tests pass, for the record
